final_text:
{
  "project_name": "Loan Management System",
  "business_summary": "A system to manage loan applications, approvals, disbursements, and repayments.",
  "actors": [
    "Customers",
    "Loan Officers",
    "Administrators"
  ],
  "functional_requirements": [
    "Customer registration",
    "Loan application submission",
    "Loan approval workflow",
    "Loan disbursement",
    "Loan repayment processing"
  ],
  "non_functional_requirements": [
    "High availability",
    "Scalability",
    "Security",
    "Performance"
  ],
  "technology_stack": {
    "frontend": "React",
    "backend": "Node.js",
    "database": "PostgreSQL",
    "api_gateway": "AWS API Gateway",
    "authentication": "OAuth 2.0"
  },
  "architecture_pattern": "Microservices",
  "modules": [
    "User Management",
    "Loan Application",
    "Loan Processing",
    "Payment Processing"
  ],
  "entities": [
    "User",
    "Loan",
    "Payment"
  ],
  "apis": [
    "User API",
    "Loan API",
    "Payment API"
  ],
  "integrations": [
    "Third-party credit check service",
    "Payment gateway"
  ],
  "security": {
    "protocols": [
      "HTTPS"
    ],
    "authentication": [
      "OAuth 2.0"
    ],
    "encryption": [
      "Encryption at rest and in transit"
    ]
  },
  "developer_handoff": [
    "API documentation and codebase access"
  ],
  "qa_handoff": [
    "Test cases and environment setup"
  ],
  "deployment_handoff": [
    "CI/CD pipeline and deployment scripts"
  ]
}
